name: NTLM Logon
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: NTLM Logon
SIGMA Description: Detects logons using NTLM, which could be caused by a legacy source or attackers

False positives:
- Legacy hosts

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=8002 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY NTLM Logon on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=8002 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: NTLM Logon SIGMA Description: Detects logons using NTLM, which could be caused by a legacy source or attackers  False positives: - Legacy hosts  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
